message:
feat(widgets): Add Stopwatch widget with state management (bd-6e9.5)

Implements StopwatchState (start/stop/toggle/reset/tick) and Stopwatch
StatefulWidget with Human, Digital, and Seconds display formats.
Supports label, running/stopped style overrides, and degradation. 31 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
